name: Jumping Jaxx
author: Poki
description: Jumping Jaxx is an endless jumper game where you must jump upwards as high as you can. Avoid hungry piranhas, dangerous explosives and the big bad wave that just won't quit! How to play: Move - Arrow keys About the creator: Jumping Jaxx is created by Gamerce , the team behind Swipe Fighter Heroes , SoulSpark , Time Quiz and Killer Snake . They are based in Denmark.
